sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Novonix Director Sharan Burrow Increases Shareholding Through Share Purchase Plan Investment
feed.summary: Novonix Limited (NVX) director Sharan Burrow invested $5,000 to acquire an additional 31,250 ordinary shares through the company's Share Purchase Plan on July 22, 2026. This transaction increased her total ordinary shareholding from 215,739 to 246,989 shares, alongside 195,938 unchanged share rights. The acquisition demonstrates her confidence in the advanced battery materials and testing company, aligning director and shareholder interests while complying with ASX disclosure rules.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Huntington Bancshares to $18 From $19, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has revised its price target for Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) to $18, down from $19, while reaffirming a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst activities for Huntington Bancshares, including Stephens adjusting its price target to $19, Baird to $21, and DA Davidson to $22. Morgan Stanley also recently downgraded Huntington Bancshares to Equalweight from Overweight.

feed.title: AMP|Ameriprise Financial Inc|Price:520.155|Chg%:-6.665
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc (AMP) closed at $520.155, down 1.27%, with strong fundamentals and high growth potential. The company is currently considered fairly valued within the Investment Banking & Investment Services industry and has high institutional ownership. Most analysts rate it as a Buy, with a target price of $551.64.

feed.title: Corteva Subsidiary EIDP Declares Two Preferred Dividends
feed.summary: Corteva, Inc. (NYSE: CTVA) announced a common stock dividend of $0.18 per share, payable on September 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 1, 2026. Separately, EIDP, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Corteva, declared regular preferred dividends on its $4.50 and $3.50 series, payable on October 23, 2026, to stockholders of record on October 2, 2026. EIDP's dividends are $1.12-1/2 per share for the $4.50 series and $0.87-1/2 per share for the $3.50 series.

feed.title: Lamb Weston Announces Q4 and Full Year Fiscal 2026 Results; Company Delivered Net Sales and Adjusted EBITDA Exceeding High End of Guidance and Advanced Focus to Win Strategy
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. announced strong fiscal fourth quarter and full-year 2026 results, surpassing guidance for net sales and Adjusted EBITDA, primarily driven by robust North American performance. The company's "Focus to Win" strategy showed significant progress, leading to customer momentum and operational improvements despite challenges in the EMEA business due to the Middle East conflict and inflation. Lamb Weston also provided its fiscal 2027 outlook, projecting stable net sales and an increase in Adjusted EBITDA and Adjusted Diluted EPS.

feed.title: NewAmsterdam Pharma and Menarini Group Receive Positive CHMP Opinion Recommending Marketing Authorization for Ubeslo® (Obicetrapib Monotherapy) and Evlarco® (Obicetrapib Plus Ezetimibe Fixed-Dose Combination)
feed.summary: NewAmsterdam Pharma and Menarini Group have received a positive opinion from the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) recommending marketing authorization for Ubeslo® (obicetrapib monotherapy) and Evlarco® (obicetrapib plus ezetimibe fixed-dose combination) in Europe. These therapies are for patients with primary hypercholesterolemia and aim to address unmet needs in lowering LDL-C. The European Commission is expected to make a final decision in the second half of 2026, which could lead to commercialization across EU member states and other regions.

feed.title: TE Connectivity to acquire advanced power solutions leader Astrodyne TDI
feed.summary: TE Connectivity announced its acquisition of Astrodyne TDI, a leading provider of advanced power management and filter solutions. This move strengthens TE's portfolio in specialized power solutions for mission-critical industrial applications, such as semiconductor manufacturing, medical, and defense. The acquisition aims to enhance TE's ability to address complex technical challenges and accelerate product innovation through Astrodyne TDI's engineering expertise and global scale.

feed.title: General Mills Brings the Magic of Harry Potter™ Home with New Treats from Betty Crocker and Pillsbury
feed.summary: General Mills is introducing a new line of Harry Potter-inspired products from Pillsbury and Betty Crocker, including Golden Snitch Shaped Cookies, Chocolate Frog Truffle Kits, Hogwarts House Pumpkin Cakes, Forbidden Forest Chocolate Cakes, and Harry Potter Fruit Snacks. These magical treats and baking kits are designed for fans to celebrate the beloved wizarding world at home. The products will be available at retailers nationwide starting in July.

feed.title: Georgia Power to serve major OpenAI project under new customer protection agreement
feed.summary: Georgia Power will provide electric service for a new OpenAI research and deployment facility in Effingham County, Georgia, under a new customer protection agreement. This agreement, one of the largest demand response commitments of its kind, requires OpenAI to cover infrastructure costs and commit to reducing electricity use during peak demand. The project is expected to bring significant investment and jobs to Georgia while helping reduce the need for additional generating resources and offering potential long-term savings for Georgia Power customers.

feed.title: Opinion | California should let aging, polluting oil refineries close and help communities brave the impact
feed.summary: The author argues that California should allow its aging oil refineries to retire without public financial support, despite potential gasoline price increases and job losses. The article suggests mitigating impacts through increased gasoline imports, pipeline development, and robust support for displaced workers and communities, including ensuring refiners cover cleanup costs. This approach aims to align with California's clean energy transition while ensuring affordable fuel and environmental protection.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.02 (NYSE:IR)
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per share, payable on September 3rd to shareholders of record as of August 13th. This dividend represents an annualized yield of about 0.1% and is well covered by the company's earnings, with a 2.2% payout ratio. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: NextEra Energy beats earnings but misses on revenue By Investing.com
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE: NEE) reported strong second-quarter adjusted earnings of $1.15 per share, surpassing analyst estimates by $0.06, driven by growth in both FPL and NextEra Energy Resources. However, the company's revenue of $7.53 billion fell short of expectations. NextEra Energy maintained its adjusted earnings per share guidance for 2026 and reiterated its long-term growth targets.

feed.title: North America Industrial Hand Tools Market Size, 2035 Report
feed.summary: The North America industrial hand tools market was valued at USD 9.5 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 14.5 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 4.3% from 2026. This growth is driven by increasing manufacturing activity, infrastructure development, and rising MRO activities, particularly in the U.S. Stanley Black & Decker Inc. leads the market with over 12% share, while online distribution channels are expected to become primary procurement channels by the mid-2030s.

feed.title: CNBC ‘Final Trades’: Netflix, AbbVie, Cerebras Systems - Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX), CrowdStrike Holdings (NAS
feed.summary: This article summarizes the "Final Trades" segment on CNBC, highlighting stock picks from various financial experts. Recommendations include AbbVie (ABBV) with a raised price target, Transocean (RIG) ahead of earnings, Cerebras Systems (CBRS) due to a new cybersecurity partnership with CrowdStrike (CRWD), and Netflix (NFLX) despite mixed Q2 results. The article also provides the latest stock prices for these companies.

feed.title: Cantor reiterates Hartford Financial stock rating after soft results By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has reiterated an "Overweight" rating for Hartford Financial Services (NYSE: HIG) with a $158.00 price target, despite the company reporting its second consecutive quarter of soft results. The analyst noted that messy employee benefits and increasing combined ratios in middle markets and national accounts contributed to the weakness. Although Q2 earnings surpassed analyst expectations ($3.42 EPS vs. $3.21), the firm expects consensus earnings revisions to skew negative, potentially delaying a re-rating of Hartford's stock.

feed.title: PPG Industries stock trades steady as coatings leader highlights earnings momentum
feed.summary: PPG Industries stock is trading steady on the NYSE, with investors noting double-digit profit growth, strong cash generation, and consistent dividend payouts. The company reported roughly $18.2 billion in net sales and adjusted EPS of approximately $7.75, up from $6.95, driven by pricing actions and operational efficiencies. Diversified end markets, including automotive, aerospace, and architectural coatings, contribute to the company's resilience and offer a stable investment profile with a strong balance sheet.

feed.title: American Express rides a boom in Platinum cards to its strongest spending growth in years
feed.summary: American Express is experiencing its strongest spending growth in three years, largely driven by the popularity of its Platinum cards. The company has invested in its premium customer segment, refreshing Platinum card perks like Lululemon credits and Oura Ring contributions, despite the card's $895 annual fee. This focus on premium offerings has made the Platinum card portfolio Amex's fastest-growing franchise.

feed.title: American Express Q2 2026 earnings beat estimates, raises revenue forecast
feed.summary: American Express reported stronger-than-expected Q2 2026 earnings, with an 11% increase in earnings per share to $4.53, surpassing analyst estimates. The company raised its full-year revenue growth guidance to 10%, driven by accelerated spend and revenue growth, particularly from its Platinum card portfolio. American Express also announced the proposed acquisition of TheFork, a European restaurant booking platform, as part of its growth initiatives.

feed.title: Fund Update: 59,361 PALO ALTO NETWORKS (PANW) shares added to BANQUE PICTET & CIE SA portfolio
feed.summary: BANQUE PICTET & CIE SA has increased its holdings in Palo Alto Networks (PANW) by adding 59,361 shares, as disclosed in a recent SEC 13F filing for the report period ending June 30, 2026. This article also details significant hedge fund activity, insider trading, congressional stock transactions, and recent analyst ratings and price targets for PANW.

feed.title: Q2 EPS Forecast for CenterPoint Energy Boosted by Analyst
feed.summary: KeyCorp has raised its Q2 2026 EPS forecast for CenterPoint Energy (NYSE: CNP) to $0.36 from $0.33, maintaining an "Overweight" rating and a $46 price target. This adjustment comes despite CenterPoint Energy recently missing quarterly EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations. The company also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.24 per share, resulting in a 2.2% yield.

feed.title: Former Booking Holdings finance chief David Goulden joins HPE's board
feed.summary: HPE has appointed David Goulden, former Executive Vice President and CFO of Booking Holdings Inc., to its Board of Directors. Goulden brings extensive management and financial leadership experience from global technology companies, including a decade in senior roles at EMC Corporation. His expertise in enterprise technology, finance, operations, and M&A is expected to be a significant asset to HPE as it advances its strategy in AI, cloud, and networking solutions.

feed.title: Apple Stock Trades Above Every Major Moving Average Heading Into Q3
feed.summary: Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) stock is trading above its major moving averages, signaling a bullish trend ahead of its Q3 earnings report on July 30. Investors will focus on iPhone revenue, services growth, gross margin, and international demand. Despite a strong momentum and quality score from Benzinga Edge, the stock's high valuation could be a risk if earnings or guidance disappoints.

feed.title: NexGen Energy stock trades in step with uranium outlook as Rook I project advances
feed.summary: NexGen Energy's stock performance is closely tied to the progress of its Rook I uranium project in Saskatchewan and broader uranium market trends. The company, currently pre-revenue, relies on project economics, permitting updates, and financing announcements to shape investor expectations, with its valuation sensitive to long-term uranium prices. The Rook I project is positioned as a future significant contributor to global uranium supply, emphasizing high-grade ore and competitive operating costs.

feed.title: SLB Posts Higher Revenue on Increased Offshore Activity, Data-Center Demand
feed.summary: SLB (formerly Schlumberger) reported higher revenue in the second quarter, driven by increased offshore activity and robust demand from its data-center business. Revenue rose 5% to $8.97 billion, surpassing Wall Street expectations, despite ongoing disruptions in the Middle East. However, the company's profit decreased to $786 million, or 52 cents per share, compared to $1.01 billion, or 74 cents per share, in the prior year.

feed.title: Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) Raised to Strong-Buy at BTIG Research
feed.summary: BTIG Research upgraded Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE: LYV) to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade contributes to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for LYV, with a target price of $195.95. Despite missing earnings estimates, the company's revenue grew by 12.1% year-over-year, reaching $3.79 billion.

feed.title: NextEra Energy second-quarter 2026 financial results available on company's website - Jul 24, 2026
feed.summary: NextEra Energy has announced that its second-quarter 2026 financial results are now available on the company's website. The release pertains to NextEra Energy, Florida Power & Light Company, and NextEra Energy Resources. Interested parties can access the full details via a provided link.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) Downgraded to Hold Rating by Capital One Financial
feed.summary: Capital One Financial has downgraded Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) from "strong-buy" to "hold," reflecting a broader cautious sentiment among analysts. The company has a consensus "Hold" rating with a $31.00 price target, and recently reported mixed quarterly results, missing EPS estimates but slightly beating on revenue, and continues to face challenges with profitability and high debt levels. Insider selling and institutional investor activity have also been noted.

feed.title: Realty Income stock trades steadily as rent growth supports cash flow
feed.summary: Realty Income (NYSE: O) continues to attract income-oriented investors due to its stable rental income, long dividend track record, and net lease business model. Recent quarterly figures show that rental growth and strategic acquisitions are positively impacting its funds from operations (AFFO) and supporting its consistent monthly dividend payouts. The company's diversified portfolio, high occupancy rates, and focus on essential retail tenants contribute to predictable cash flows, making it a key component for income-focused portfolios despite interest rate sensitivities.

feed.title: RBC Raises Price Target on Roper Technologies to $417 From $407, Keeps Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has increased its price target for Roper Technologies (ROP) to $417 from $407, while maintaining a "Sector Perform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst recent news regarding Roper Technologies, including an equity buyback plan update and various analyst target adjustments. The company recently reported its Q2 2026 earnings, showing adjusted earnings and revenue growth, and raised its 2026 adjusted EPS guidance.

feed.title: Evergy stock trades steadily as regulated earnings and dividend support long term returns
feed.summary: Evergy stock trades steadily, reflecting its profile as a regulated Midwest utility with stable earnings and a consistent dividend. The company's financial performance, driven by regulated electricity sales, shows modest profit growth and a sustainable dividend payout ratio of around 41%. Significant capital expenditures in grid modernization and renewables, along with careful management of debt and operating costs, support long-term returns and stability, despite interest rate sensitivities inherent to utilities.

feed.title: Moeve and ArcelorMittal Sign Largest Energy Savings Certificate Agreement in Spain - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Moeve and ArcelorMittal have signed Spain's largest Energy Savings Certificate (CAE) agreement, representing 2.1 TWh of annual energy savings, which is ten times larger than the previous record. This deal will help ArcelorMittal's decarbonization efforts for its Gijon long products unit, including the investment in a new electric arc furnace, and is expected to cut over 5% of Asturias's final energy consumption and reduce CO2 emissions by up to one million metric tons. The agreement highlights the growing importance of CAEs in driving industrial energy transition and decarbonization in Spain.

feed.title: NextNav (NASDAQ:NN) Upgraded to Strong-Buy at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded NextNav (NASDAQ:NN) from "hold" to "strong-buy," contributing to a positive analyst outlook. The company's stock, however, was down 1.2% in recent trading, opening at $12.65, significantly below its 50-day and 200-day moving averages. Despite recent insider selling, NextNav reported better-than-expected quarterly results, beating EPS and revenue estimates.

feed.title: RBC Capital Maintains MPLX LP(MPLX.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $60
feed.summary: RBC Capital has reiterated its Buy rating for MPLX LP (MPLX.US), maintaining a target price of $60. This reflects their continued positive outlook on the company's financial performance and market position.

feed.title: Vertiv (NYSE:VRT) Rating Increased to Strong-Buy at KeyCorp
feed.summary: KeyCorp upgraded Vertiv (NYSE:VRT) to a "strong-buy" rating, contributing to an overall positive analyst outlook. Vertiv's first-quarter earnings exceeded expectations, driven by a 30.1% year-over-year revenue increase, fueled by strong demand related to AI and data center growth. The company is actively expanding capacity and deploying NVIDIA DGX GB300 AI computing capability, with analysts maintaining a consensus target price of $343.48 for the stock.

feed.title: Inside Larry Culp’s playbook for fixing GE
feed.summary: Larry Culp's leadership has transformed General Electric from a distressed industrial giant into three high-performing public companies: GE HealthCare, GE Vernova, and GE Aerospace. This overhaul, driven by balance-sheet repair, operating discipline, and value creation, resulted in a combined equity value nearing $700 billion. GE Aerospace, in particular, demonstrates strong financial performance with significant free cash flow growth and exceeding revenue forecasts.

feed.title: NextEra Energy beats second-quarter profit estimates
feed.summary: NextEra Energy reported second-quarter adjusted profit that surpassed Wall Street estimates, driven by strong performance in its renewables division and increasing power demand. The company's regulated utility, Florida Power & Light, saw a net income increase, while NextEra Energy Resources significantly expanded its backlog of new renewables and storage projects, responding to the growing electricity needs from data centers and other electrified technologies.

feed.title: SLB Stock Rises on Earnings Beat as Strong Activity Offsets Middle East Disruption
feed.summary: SLB's stock rose after the oilfield services company exceeded Wall Street's expectations for its second-quarter earnings. Strong offshore drilling activity outside the Middle East helped to offset disruptions in that region. This performance led to a positive market reaction for SLB shares.

feed.title: Form 4 Franklin Resources Inc For: 24 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article from Investing.com reports the filing of a Form 4 for Franklin Resources Inc. on July 24. A Form 4 is a document that must be filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) whenever there is a change in the ownership of company stock by company insiders. The article also provides Franklin Resources' stock symbol (BEN) and its current performance (-0.28%).

feed.title: CoStar Group (CSGP) Could Be 39% Undervalued After Its CFO Change
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) recently appointed Robin Rossmann as its new CFO, effective July 31, 2026, which has highlighted the company's financial leadership and capital allocation strategies. Despite significant share price declines over the past year, a popular valuation narrative suggests CSGP is 39% undervalued, with a fair value of $44.45 per share, based on expectations of future growth and richer margins. However, concerns remain regarding Homes.com adoption and intense market competition, while the stock's P/S ratio compared to industry averages presents mixed signals for investors.

feed.title: Equinix (EQIX) Could Be 14% Below Fair Value Following Q2 Earnings Focus
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) is heading into its Q2 2026 earnings release seemingly undervalued by 13.7% according to analyst narratives, which set a fair value of $1,197.11 against its current price of $1,033.55. However, its high P/E ratio of 71.7x compared to peers' 31x suggests investors are already paying a premium. The company's performance is closely tied to demand for AI and digital transformation.

feed.title: Pentagon, Oracle sign massive software consolidation contract worth nearly $7B over next decade
feed.summary: The Pentagon and Oracle have signed a software consolidation deal worth up to $6.9 billion over the next decade. This agreement covers the entire Defense Department, Coast Guard, and intelligence community, aiming to advance the "Arsenal of Freedom" initiative and save taxpayers an estimated $441 million. The deal allows military departments and agencies to expedite procurement of Oracle's commercial products and services, including cloud and AI technology.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (PG) Could Be 23% Undervalued On Earnings Caution
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) is experiencing caution among analysts ahead of its July 29th earnings report, with expectations of declining EPS despite sales growth. While one narrative suggests an overvalued fair price of $121.06, Simply Wall St's DCF model indicates a fair value of $191.89, suggesting the stock could be 23.4% undervalued. Investors are advised to review the full data due to these mixed signals.

feed.title: Consolidated Edison stock holds steady as regulated earnings and dividend profile support valuation
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison (NYSE: ED) maintains a defensive profile on the NYSE, supported by consistent regulated earnings growth, especially with positive 2025 guidance, and a long history of dividend payments. These factors anchor investor confidence and underpin the company's valuation, driven by stable rate base expansion and a conservative financial strategy. The utility's focus on grid modernization and clean energy investments further contributes to its predictable financial performance.

feed.title: RBC Lowers Price Target on Molina Healthcare to $218 From $248, Keeps Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has lowered its price target for Molina Healthcare (MOH) to $218 from $248, while maintaining a Sector Perform rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst news of Molina Healthcare sharply cutting its Obamacare business due to rising costs, despite lifting its annual profit forecast. The article also mentions recent Q2 earnings results and other analyst adjustments for the company.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (HCA) HCA Healthcare, Inc. Reports Q2 Revenue $20.23B, vs. FactSet Est of $19.77B
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. announced its second-quarter revenue reached $20.23 billion, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $19.77 billion. The company also posted Q2 adjusted EPS of $7.59 per share, exceeding FactSet's estimate of $7.56. Additionally, HCA Healthcare provided guidance, expecting its 2026 revenue to range from $77.00 billion to $79.50 billion and EPS to be between $28.70 and $30.50.

feed.title: SBA Communications (NASDAQ: SBAC) prices new notes and secures $2.5B credit facility
feed.summary: SBA Communications has completed a significant refinancing of its capital structure, issuing $3.5 billion in new senior unsecured notes with maturities in 2030, 2031, and 2033, and establishing a new $2.5 billion senior unsecured revolving credit facility. The proceeds from the note offering were primarily used to repay existing secured term loans and revolving credit facilities, with remaining funds allocated for general corporate purposes. The new financial arrangements feature specific leverage covenants and define conditions for redemption and change-of-control events.

feed.title: VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS ($VZ) Releases Q2 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS ($VZ) reported its Q2 2026 earnings, missing both revenue and earnings per share estimates. The company reported earnings of $1.30 per share and revenue of $34.253 billion. The article also details recent insider trading, hedge fund activity, congressional stock trading, and analyst price targets for VZ.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare cites uninsured volume in ~$400M pretax hit
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare reported its second-quarter 2026 results, showing an 8.7% increase in revenues to $20.230 billion but a slight increase in net income attributable to HCA Healthcare, Inc. of 2.8% to $1.699 billion. The company attributes an approximate $400 million unfavorable impact on income before income taxes to a payer mix shift, primarily due to an increase in uninsured patients after losing coverage on health insurance exchanges. HCA Healthcare also updated its 2026 guidance, lowering its net income and diluted EPS projections, while increasing its estimate for the negative impact from health insurance exchanges to $1.0 billion - $1.2 billion.

feed.title: NextEra Energy executives to discuss Q2 results in webcast
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE: NEE) has announced that its second-quarter 2026 financial results are now available on its website. Senior management will review these results during a live, listen-only webcast commencing at 9 a.m. ET today, with a replay accessible for 90 days. The announcement provided no financial figures but noted the historical mixed market reaction to such earnings posts.

feed.title: NextEra Energy second-quarter 2026 financial results available on company's website
feed.summary: NextEra Energy, Inc. has announced that its second-quarter 2026 financial results are now available on the company's website. A live webcast presentation by senior management discussing these results will begin at 9 a.m. ET today, with a replay available for 90 days. NextEra Energy is North America's largest electric power and energy infrastructure company, owning Florida Power & Light Company and NextEra Energy Resources, LLC.
